purpose: Implementation-only pilot for the independent lattice first-contact mechanism before freezing final analysis seeds.
pilot_seed_exclusion: All pilot seeds are permanently excluded from the v0.4.0 powered analysis.

mechanism.rule: A cardinal lattice random walker attaches at its first Moore-neighborhood contact with an active node.
mechanism.least_capture_lineage: The v0.3.1 even_spread behavior is retained under the accurate descriptive name least_capture_balancer and is not a gate control.

decision.reason: The pilot showed first-contact concentration without fallback or capture-history leakage. The repair gate remained free to fail.

claim_boundary: This pilot checks implementation behavior and cannot support the final scientific claim. Only the preregistered 5101-5196 run may decide the v0.4.0 gates.
